payload.question: Show the distribution of final grades across all courses

output.sql:
WITH grade_buckets AS (
  SELECT
    final_grade AS final_grade,
    CASE
      WHEN final_grade >= 100 THEN 90
      WHEN final_grade >= 90 THEN 90
      WHEN final_grade >= 80 THEN 80
      WHEN final_grade >= 70 THEN 70
      WHEN final_grade >= 60 THEN 60
      WHEN final_grade >= 50 THEN 50
      WHEN final_grade >= 40 THEN 40
      WHEN final_grade >= 30 THEN 30
      WHEN final_grade >= 20 THEN 20
      WHEN final_grade >= 10 THEN 10
      WHEN final_grade >= 0 THEN 0
      ELSE NULL
    END AS bucket_start
  FROM grades
  WHERE final_grade IS NOT NULL
)
SELECT
  bucket_start AS bucket_start,
  CASE
    WHEN bucket_start = 90 THEN '90-100'
    WHEN bucket_start = 80 THEN '80-89'
    WHEN bucket_start = 70 THEN '70-79'
    WHEN bucket_start = 60 THEN '60-69'
    WHEN bucket_start = 50 THEN '50-59'
    WHEN bucket_start = 40 THEN '40-49'
    WHEN bucket_start = 30 THEN '30-39'
    WHEN bucket_start = 20 THEN '20-29'
    WHEN bucket_start = 10 THEN '10-19'
    WHEN bucket_start = 0 THEN '0-9'
    ELSE 'Other'
  END AS bucket_label,
  COUNT(*) AS count
FROM grade_buckets
WHERE bucket_start IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY bucket_start
ORDER BY bucket_start ASC;

visualization.title: Distribution of final grades across all courses

payload.sql:
WITH grade_buckets AS (
  SELECT
    final_grade AS final_grade,
    CASE
      WHEN final_grade >= 100 THEN 90
      WHEN final_grade >= 90 THEN 90
      WHEN final_grade >= 80 THEN 80
      WHEN final_grade >= 70 THEN 70
      WHEN final_grade >= 60 THEN 60
      WHEN final_grade >= 50 THEN 50
      WHEN final_grade >= 40 THEN 40
      WHEN final_grade >= 30 THEN 30
      WHEN final_grade >= 20 THEN 20
      WHEN final_grade >= 10 THEN 10
      WHEN final_grade >= 0 THEN 0
      ELSE NULL
    END AS bucket_start
  FROM grades
  WHERE final_grade IS NOT NULL
)
SELECT
  bucket_start AS bucket_start,
  CASE
    WHEN bucket_start = 90 THEN '90-100'
    WHEN bucket_start = 80 THEN '80-89'
    WHEN bucket_start = 70 THEN '70-79'
    WHEN bucket_start = 60 THEN '60-69'
    WHEN bucket_start = 50 THEN '50-59'
    WHEN bucket_start = 40 THEN '40-49'
    WHEN bucket_start = 30 THEN '30-39'
    WHEN bucket_start = 20 THEN '20-29'
    WHEN bucket_start = 10 THEN '10-19'
    WHEN bucket_start = 0 THEN '0-9'
    ELSE 'Other'
  END AS bucket_label,
  COUNT(*) AS count
FROM grade_buckets
WHERE bucket_start IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY bucket_start
ORDER BY bucket_start ASC;
